title: Verify no offer pop-up when incentive offer is disabled in backend
description: Test that when backend disables the incentive offer feature, canceling directly proceeds to cancellation without showing discount offer
preconditions: Incentive offer is disabled in backend configuration

steps.description: 1. Configure backend to disable incentive offer
2. Login with user having active trial

expected_result: User directly proceeds to cancellation feedback without seeing discount offer pop-up
